debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_4
inst✝¹ : Fintype d
inst✝ : DecidableEq d
ρ : MState d
ψ : Ket d
⊢ ρ.exp_val ↑(MState.pure ψ) = 1 ↔ ρ = MState.pure ψ

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · intro h
    have h_norm : (ρ.M - (MState.pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (MState.pure ψ).M) = 0 := by
      simp only [HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.mul_sub, Matrix.sub_mul, Matrix.trace_sub]
      rw [MState.pure_mul_self, MState.trace_one, Matrix.trace_mul_comm]
      simp only [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner] at h
      rw [h]
      have := HermitianMat.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.M ρ.M ρ.zero_le ρ.zero_le
      rw [ρ.trace_one] at this
      simp only [HermitianMat.inner] at this
      linarith
    ext
    exact sub_eq_zero.mp (HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero.mp h_norm)
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, MState.trace_one]

    have h_zero : (ρ.m - P.m).inner (ρ.m - P.m) = 0 := by
      apply le_antisymm
      · rw [h_calc]; linarith
      · apply HermitianMat.inner_self_nonneg
    rwa [← HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at h_zero
  · rintro rfl
    simp [exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, MState.trace_one]

constructor
  · intro h
    let P := MState.pure ψ
    have h_diff : (ρ.m - P.m).inner (ρ.m - P.m) = 0 := by
      unfold HermitianMat.inner
      simp only [Matrix.mul_sub, Matrix.sub_mul, Matrix.trace_sub]
      rw [MState.pure_mul_self, P.trace_one, ρ.trace_one]
      have h_exp : Matrix.trace (ρ.m * P.m) = 1 := by
        simpa [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner] using h
      rw [h_exp, Matrix.trace_mul_comm P.m, h_exp]
      have h_rho : Matrix.trace (ρ.m * ρ.m) ≤ 1 := by
        have := ρ.m.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.zero_le ρ.zero_le
        rw [HermitianMat.inner, ρ.trace_one] at this
        simpa using this
      linarith
    ext
    exact HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero.mp h_diff
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, (pure ψ).trace_one]

constructor
  · intro h
    apply MState.ext
    apply HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero.mp
    have h_le : HermitianMat.inner ρ.m ρ.m ≤ 1 := by
      simpa [ρ.trace_eq_one] using HermitianMat.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.zero_le ρ.zero_le
    have h_eq : HermitianMat.inner (ρ.m - (pure ψ).m) (ρ.m - (pure ψ).m) = 0 := by
      rw [HermitianMat.inner_sub_sub]
      have h_pure : HermitianMat.inner (pure ψ).m (pure ψ).m = 1 := by
        simp [HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, MState.trace_eq_one]
      simp [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner] at h
      rw [h_pure, h]
      linarith
    exact h_eq
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, MState.trace_eq_one]

constructor
  · intro h
    apply MState.ext
    have h_norm : HermitianMat.inner (ρ.m - (pure ψ).m) (ρ.m - (pure ψ).m) = 0 := by
      rw [HermitianMat.inner_sub_left, HermitianMat.inner_sub_right, HermitianMat.inner_sub_right]
      have h_pure : HermitianMat.inner (pure ψ).m (pure ψ).m = 1 := by
        rw [HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self]
        exact (pure ψ).trace_one
      have h_rho : HermitianMat.inner ρ.m ρ.m ≤ 1 := by
        have := ρ.m.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.zero_le ρ.zero_le
        rw [ρ.trace_one] at this
        simpa using this
      have h_cross : HermitianMat.inner ρ.m (pure ψ).m = 1 := h
      rw [h_cross, h_pure]
      rw [HermitianMat.inner_comm] at h_cross
      rw [h_cross]
      linarith
    exact HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero.mp h_norm
  · rintro rfl
    rw [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self]
    exact (pure ψ).trace_one

constructor
  · intro h
    apply MState.ext
    let P := MState.pure ψ
    have h_le : ρ.m.inner ρ.m ≤ 1 := by
      have := ρ.m.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.pos ρ.pos
      rwa [ρ.trace_one, mul_one] at this
    have h_dist : (ρ.m - P.m).inner (ρ.m - P.m) = 0 := by
      rw [HermitianMat.inner_sub_left, HermitianMat.inner_sub_right, HermitianMat.inner_sub_right]
      simp only [HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.trace_mul_comm, MState.pure_mul_self, MState.trace_one]
      simp only [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.trace_mul_comm] at h
      rw [h, h]
      linarith
    rwa [← HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at h_dist
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, MState.trace_one]

constructor
  · intro h
    apply MState.ext
    have h_val : ρ.m.inner (pure ψ).m = 1 := by simpa [MState.exp_val] using h
    have h_dist : (ρ.m - (pure ψ).m).inner (ρ.m - (pure ψ).m) = 0 := by
      simp [HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.mul_sub, Matrix.sub_mul, Matrix.trace_sub]
      rw [Matrix.trace_mul_comm ρ.m, ←HermitianMat.inner, h_val]
      rw [MState.pure_mul_self, (pure ψ).trace_eq_one]
      have : ρ.m.inner ρ.m ≤ 1 := by
        have := ρ.m.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.pos ρ.pos
        rwa [ρ.trace_eq_one, one_pow] at this
      linarith
    rw [HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero_iff, sub_eq_zero] at h_dist
    exact h_dist
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, (pure ψ).trace_eq_one]

constructor
  · intro h
    apply MState.ext
    let P : MState d := pure ψ
    have : (ρ.m - P.m).inner (ρ.m - P.m) = 0 := by
      have h_le : ρ.m.inner ρ.m ≤ 1 := by
        have := ρ.m.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.zero_le ρ.zero_le
        rwa [ρ.trace_one, mul_one] at this
      have h_pure : P.m.inner P.m = 1 := by
        simp only [HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, P.trace_one]
      have h_cross : ρ.m.inner P.m = 1 := by
        simpa [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner] using h
      rw [HermitianMat.inner_sub_left, HermitianMat.inner_sub_right, HermitianMat.inner_comm P.m, h_pure, h_cross]
      linarith
    rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero]
    exact this
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, MState.trace_one]

constructor
  · intro h
    ext
    have h_inner : HermitianMat.inner (ρ.m - (pure ψ).m) (ρ.m - (pure ψ).m) = 0 := by
      rw [HermitianMat.inner_sub_left, HermitianMat.inner_sub_right]
      simp only [HermitianMat.inner_comm, HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_purity, MState.pure_purity]
      change _ - 2 * ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) + 1 = 0
      rw [h]
      linarith [ρ.purity_le_one]
    exact eq_of_sub_eq_zero (HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero.mp h_inner)
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_purity, MState.pure_purity]
